title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori (backed by Fei-Fei Li and Jeff Dean), argues that most AI agents fail in practice due to error compounding across workflow steps. He contends that achieving 90% accuracy per step still leads to failure in 10, 20, or 50-step workflows, and that reliability matters more than raw performance in shipping production agents.
